title: OPdium
description: A lightweight Minecraft modpack focused on performance, stability, and smooth gameplay for vanilla.
body:
🟢 Modpack Description (Performance / FPS)

🚀 Performance-optimized Minecraft modpack!
This modpack is designed to boost FPS, reduce lag, and make Minecraft run much smoother.
It keeps the vanilla feel while adding modern optimizations, making it perfect for low-end PCs or players who want high render distance with great performance.
